meaning: adj.教师的,教育学的,教授法的
examples: The relationship to nature is an important part of the school's pedagogic concept.
Lecturing week after week, as part of the pedagogic routine, is more of a test than people realise.

What is the real level of dynamism or passion or pedagogic hunger for information about innovation?
Most of them turn out to be long-winded hagiographies or self-absorbed and pedagogic narratives.
